narrative: Senior Machine Learning Engineer at Zomato with seven years of experience, bringing a solid product‑focused background. Strong JD‑relevant skill match—deep learning, learning‑to‑rank models, and hands‑on work with vector databases such as Weaviate and Milvus, plus QLoRA fine‑tuning—drives the high ranking. These capabilities align directly with the Search & Retrieval focus of the role. Availability and location fit well, as the candidate is based in Noida, within the target geography. A minor caveat is a flagged trust concern and an unknown notice period, which could affect onboarding speed.
